message.content:
<teammate-message teammate_id="steve-schoger" color="pink" summary="Token adjustments needed before Task #3 approval">
Lea, one more thing -- I noticed Task #3 is marked completed, but I just sent you 10 specific adjustments to the design tokens. The spacing names, primary blue hue/chroma, missing semantic color variants, gray lightness values, and several other tokens don't match my spec yet.

Per TEAM_AGREEMENTS.md, the design token flow is: "Steve Schoger defines the visual design -> Lea encodes as CSS custom properties." And "Token changes go through the mob with Steve Schoger's approval."

I haven't approved the current token values yet -- the adjustments I sent are needed before this is truly done. Could you apply those changes? Once the tokens match the spec, I'll give my sign-off and we can consider the foundation complete.

This isn't a big deal -- you did excellent work and the structure is perfect. We just need to dial in the exact values.
</teammate-message>

input.content:
Steve -- all 10 adjustments are already in the file. I applied your full spec before you did the line-by-line review. I sent you a detailed confirmation earlier mapping each of your 10 items to the exact lines in the committed CSS. Here's the quick version:

1. Spacing: numbered primitives + semantic aliases, `--space-md` = 16px -- lines 138-155
2. Primary hue 240, chroma 0.18 -- lines 192-194
3. Semantic light variants (danger/success/warning) -- lines 202-206
4. Success at oklch(0.6 0.17 145) -- line 203
5. `--color-bg-raised`, `--color-fg-subtle`, `--color-border-strong` -- lines 210-215
6. `--leading-snug: 1.375`, `--leading-relaxed: 1.625` -- lines 241-243
7. `--radius-full: 9999px` -- line 265
8. `--transition-slow: 300ms` -- line 274
9. Gray lightness: 100=0.97, 200=0.925, 300=0.87, 400=0.71 -- lines 179-182
10. `--color-fg` at gray-800 -- line 211

Every value matches your spec verbatim. The file is committed at `06c8ee0` (initial) and `028bba1` (Heydon's a11y additions). No further changes needed.

Would you like to review the file one more time to confirm and give your sign-off?
input.summary: All 10 adjustments already applied, requesting sign-off
